title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Cleartrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Cleartrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cleartrip family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!
